mapper.sql: select id, user_id, account, stat_day, team_new_amount, team_expired_amount, previous_team_tvl, current_team_tvl, g_day, g_smooth, base_static_rate, rate_source, calc_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, deleted from t_stake_hosting_daily_team_performance
mapper.insert: insert into t_stake_hosting_daily_team_performance ( user_id, account, stat_day, team_new_amount, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{statDay}, #{amount}, now(), now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update account = values(account), team_new_amount = team_new_amount + values(team_new_amount), calc_status = 0, update_time = now()

insert into t_stake_hosting_daily_team_performance ( user_id, account, stat_day, team_expired_amount, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{statDay}, #{amount}, now(), now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update account = values(account), team_expired_amount = team_expired_amount + values(team_expired_amount), calc_status = 0, update_time = now()

insert into t_stake_hosting_daily_team_performance ( user_id, account, stat_day, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{statDay}, now(), now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update account = values(account), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select user_id from t_stake_hosting_daily_team_performance where stat_day = #{statDay} and deleted = 0

select ifnull(sum(ifnull(o.stake_usdt_amount, 0)), 0) from t_stake_hosting_order o inner join t_user_relation r on r.pos_user_id = o.user_id and r.par_user_id = #{userId} and r.distance > 0 and r.active_flag = 1 where o.deleted = 0 and o.pay_status = 1 and o.effective_time is not null and cast(date_format(o.effective_time, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') as unsigned) <= #{snapshotTime} and (o.finish_time is null or cast(date_format(o.finish_time, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') as unsigned) > #{snapshotTime})
